revision.content:
[[File:1_whole_radio.jpg|200px|Baofeng UV-82]]
Because I could not find any instructions on the internet, here are instructions on how to disassemble the Baofeng UV-82 handheld transceiver.
==Remove Belt Clip==
[[File:2_remove_belt_clip.jpg|500px|2 small philps screws]]
==Unclip Battery==
[[File:3_unclip_battery.jpg|500px]]
[[File:4_remove_battery.jpg|500px]]
==Remove Antenna and Volume Knob==
[[File:5_unscrew_antenna.jpg|500px]]
[[File:6_remove_volume_knob.jpg|500px|It just pulls straight off.]]
==Unscrew Retaining Rings==
[[File:7_remove_antenna_retainer.jpg|500px]]
[[File:8_remove_volume_retainer.jpg|500px]]
==Pry Open Case==
[[File:9_unpry_bottom_clips.jpg|500px]]
[[File:10_bottom_popped_out.jpg|500px]]
==Remove Rear Case and Circuit Board==
[[File:11_remove_back.jpg|500px]]
==Remove Rubber Pieces==
[[File:12_rubber_jack_seal.jpg|500px]]
[[File:13_keypad.jpg|500px]]
==Disassembled==
[[File:14_disassembled.jpg|500px]]
